ocr_findings.description: Section icon rendered as '<' (less-than symbol) instead of the orange share/link icon bullet. Cosmetic only.

The 'プロジェクトの3つの制約' 学習のポイント box at page bottom: the image shows a 学習のポイント label badge with a dog mascot icon on the right side of the header. The OCR captures the box text content correctly but the badge label '学習のポイント' is missing from OCR text.

reviewer_notes: Content page on プロジェクトの3つの制約 (スコープ, スケジュール, コスト) with triangle diagram and a 試験にはコレが出る summary box. Main body text explaining the interdependence of the three constraints is faithfully reproduced. The 学習のポイント box label is missing from OCR but body text inside the box is present. All constraint terms are correctly captured.
